New Revision: 313515
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313515

Log:
  - Update to 1.5.1

Modified: head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 13:29:04 2013	(r313514)
+++ head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile	Wed Mar  6 13:43:36 2013	(r313515)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rhodecode
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	www devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -20,23 +20,22 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pylo
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}beaker>=1.6.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-beaker \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}formencode>=1.2.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-formencode \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}webhelpers>=1.3:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-webhelpers \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mako>=0.7.2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-mako \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqlalchemy>=0.7.8:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlalchemy \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mako>=0.7.3:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-mako \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sqlalchemy>=0.7.9:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlalchemy \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pygments>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-pygments \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}whoosh>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-whoosh \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Babel>=0.9.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-babel \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dulwich>=0.8.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/dulwich \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}markdown>=2.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-markdown \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dulwich>=0.8.7:${PORTSDIR}/devel/dulwich \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}markdown>=2.2.1:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-markdown \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}docutils>=0.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-docutils \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mock>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-mock \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}bcrypt>=0.2:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-bcrypt \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}simplejson>=2.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-simplejson \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}PasteScript>=1.6.3:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-pastescript \
-		mercurial>=2.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mercurial
+		mercurial>=2.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mercurial
 
 USE_PYTHON=	2.6+
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	RhodeCode

Modified: head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py.in
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py.in	Wed Mar  6 13:29:04 2013	(r313514)
+++ head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py.in	Wed Mar  6 13:43:36 2013	(r313515)
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
---- setup.py.orig	2012-09-07 19:17:25.000000000 -0300
-+++ setup.py	2012-09-18 20:52:11.031841469 -0300
-@@ -33,23 +33,22 @@
+diff --git setup.py setup.py
+index 17eb71e..1939a2c 100644
+--- setup.py
++++ setup.py
+@@ -33,23 +33,23 @@ __platform__ = platform.system()
  is_windows = __platform__ in _get_meta_var('PLATFORM_WIN', _metadata)
  
  requirements = [
@@ -13,21 +15,35 @@
 +    "Beaker>=1.6.4",
      "WebHelpers==1.3",
      "formencode==1.2.4",
-     "SQLAlchemy==0.7.8",
--    "Mako==0.7.2",
-+    "Mako>=0.7.2",
+-    "SQLAlchemy==0.7.9",
+-    "Mako==0.7.3",
++    "SQLAlchemy>=0.7.9",
++    "Mako>=0.7.3",
      "pygments>=1.5",
      "whoosh>=2.4.0,<2.5",
--    "celery>=2.2.5,<2.3",
+     "celery>=2.2.5,<2.3",
      "babel",
-     "python-dateutil>=1.5.0,<2.0.0",
-     "dulwich>=0.8.5,<0.9.0",
--    "markdown==2.1.1",
--    "docutils==0.8.1",
+-    "python-dateutil>=1.5.0,<2.0.0",
++    "python-dateutil>=1.5.0, != 2.0",
+     "dulwich>=0.8.7,<0.9.0",
+-    "markdown==2.2.1",
++    "markdown>=2.2.1",
+     "docutils==0.8.1",
 -    "simplejson==2.5.2",
-+    "markdown>=2.1.1",
-+    "docutils>=0.8.1",
 +    "simplejson>=2.5.2",
      "mock",
  ]
  
+@@ -60,10 +60,10 @@ if sys.version_info < (2, 7):
+     requirements.append("unittest2")
+ 
+ if is_windows:
+-    requirements.append("mercurial==2.4.1")
++    requirements.append("mercurial>=2.4.1")
+ else:
+     requirements.append("py-bcrypt")
+-    requirements.append("mercurial==2.4.1")
++    requirements.append("mercurial>=2.4.1")
+ 
+ 
+ dependency_links = [
